notes: Window blocks. 28 transparent shape variants — flat, slope, curved, triangle, quarter-sphere, slanted-long. All share the same profile: PCU 5, built from Glass only, health = mass (the wiki publishes identical values), snapSize 1 on every variant except Slanted Long Inverted 5 m (snap 10). `windowShape` captures the geometric family. Size class varies: 1.25 m, 2.5 m, 2.75 m, and 5 m. Curved Inward Triangle 2.75 m is the sole entry at the 2.75 m scale.

resources.description: A transparent block that allows light and visibility while providing a barrier between different environments.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
